name: Instagram (API)
description: Exports your Instagram profile, posts, followers, following, and ad interests using API-first network replay (no DOM scraping for data).

scopes.label: Your Instagram profile
scopes.description: Profile information including bio, follower counts, business details, and viewer relationship state

scopes.label: Your Instagram posts
scopes.description: Published posts from your feed with media URLs, captions, and engagement counts

scopes.label: Your followers
scopes.description: Users who follow your account, with verification and privacy flags

scopes.label: Accounts you follow
scopes.description: Users your account follows, with verification and privacy flags

scopes.label: Your ad interests
scopes.description: Advertisers, ad topics, and targeting categories from Meta Accounts Center
